title: DomusMind
description: Open household infrastructure that models and coordinates family operations.

hero.title: The Operating System for Family Life
hero.body: DomusMind turns the invisible cognitive load of household coordination into shared operational infrastructure.

sections.title: The Problem
sections.body: Modern households run complex systems, but coordination usually lives inside one person’s head. This creates stress, imbalance, and nonstop context switching.

sections.title: What DomusMind Is
sections.body: DomusMind is not a task app, calendar app, budget tool, or grocery list. Those tools manage fragments. DomusMind models the household system itself.

sections.title: Open Infrastructure Movement
sections.body: Families deserve infrastructure. Household data should belong to the family. DomusMind is open household infrastructure built in the open.

developer.title: For developers
developer.body: Explore architecture, domain, and contribution paths.
developer.label: Explore Architecture

family.title: For families
family.body: Follow the project and become an early adopter.
family.label: Follow the Project
